item.title: 17:56, 19 July 2026
item.description: Hmm. I think I’ve accidentally added ‘fox’ into the goat-pupper-Thor ambiguity here.

media:content.media:description: Warm orange-browns added to the forward-facing fur of the mini. Not convinced it’s a great choice. His eyeballs are definitely going to need some brightening up to read properly too. A second round of eyeball booping required 😬

item.title: 13:21, 19 July 2026
item.description: Divebombed by butterflies.

item.title: 14:21, 18 July 2026
item.description: If the camera can’t even focus them, we call them done, right?

media:content.media:description: I definitely put paint on a brush and the brush on the eyeball, but you wouldn’t even know it from this blurry zoomed shot.

item.title: 13:52, 17 July 2026
item.description: I’m not sure my lolly requirements have ever previously been high enough to have reached the level required for such differential subtlety.

item.title: 13:51, 17 July 2026
item.description: Is there an existing word for the transition point in an ice lolly which, while not yet being drippy, will immediately begin to break up pleasingly upon insertion into the face hole?

item.title: 19:44, 14 July 2026
item.description:
Teeny tiny tippity-taps of NMM.

Eyeball count: still zero.

media:content.media:description: The tiny pupper’s breastplate now has a mix of blues and greens blobbed together in something that might, if you squint, be taken for a reflection of unseen surrounding nature. Heavy white has been applied on the uppermost curvy bits in a lie (blatant! unrepentant!) to imply bright directional light.

item.title: 17:22, 12 July 2026
item.description: It’s all fun and games picking up the world’s smallest pupper, but then you realise this thing has eyeballs which will need painting.

media:content.media:description: One (1) hand of approximately human proportions holding a tiny horned doggo, placed on a standard-reference painting handle. The doggo is entirely wee. It wears a cool skirt.

item.title: 14:25, 9 July 2026
item.description: The heat batters our precious, human flesh like a seagull defending a car park.

item.title: 16:56, 6 July 2026
item.description: It also implies that dinosaurs probably had quite a sarcastic laugh.

item.title: 21:21, 3 July 2026
item.description: Gulls make a lot more sense when you properly consider their ancestry. Stomping around, loudly roaring, terrorising small mammals.

item.title: 21:19, 30 June 2026
item.description: It feels like there’s way more going on than can conceivably be contained by the stuff it’s happening within.

item.title: 16:23, 28 June 2026
item.description: Little bit of a contrast boop.

media:content.media:description: Some paler greens and yellows are applied to the mini for a bit of tonal variation and highlighting on various upward facing pointy bits. Really hard to tell if it’s having the desired effect when you insist on painting green while knowing you have red/green colour blindness. Why do you do that, you numpty? Blue is right there. ‘Spider-Man Noir With The Rubik’s Cube’ needs to be added to my personal Darmok language.

item.title: 11:12, 26 June 2026
item.description: Angrier rain, angrier thunder, angrier heat. The culture-shock slip into seen-on-TV weather.

item.title: 15:59, 25 June 2026
item.description: Roaming the house in a daze howling for lollies.

item.title: 18:57, 24 June 2026
item.description: Apron time.

media:content.media:description: A cream-y tabard starts to appear. Very Knights Templar-y, which is always a worry. No doubt hammered together from the very bones of his enemies, those darned teens. It just needs a few cool dinosaur stickers or something on it.

item.title: 18:44, 20 June 2026
item.description: Ahh, forgot the ‘always put their hats on so you don’t have to paint their eyeballs’ rule.

media:content.media:description: The little man has a little face, the blue of his eyes may or may not be launching an invasion of his cheekbones. Need to step up my squinting and go in for a second pass 😬

item.title: 15:43, 20 June 2026
item.description: Using this one to do a bit of airbrush practice. What do we reckon, ‘green’?

media:content.media:description: The mini’s bib, gun and chic accessories are blacked out while the armour was given an initial dark green base tone and progressively airbrushed with yellow highlights. Violet ink shades the deepest shadows.

item.title: 13:48, 20 June 2026
item.description: “Hey! What are you teens up to?”

media:content.media:description: A friendly giant space wizard arrives on the painting handle, gatling gun safely lowered, admonishing subject or subjects unseen with a raised finger. He’s wearing what appears to be a cooking apron and has presumably been interrupted while baking biscuits.

item.title: 18:13, 5 June 2026
item.description: There are bad seasons of the X-Files and then there’s… whatever this is.

media:content.media:description: Weirdly, not a parody image. Fox Mulder wielding a sword in the old west wearing laser tag armour, elbow pads, and shades.

item.title: 13:45, 5 June 2026
item.description: They were just doing their best @1moremin
